name: Report slot task snapshot format
definitionOfDone: AMCore runtime template shows today's completed tasks and currently active tasks before follow-up decisions
The non-actionable confirmation-rules section is removed from the report UI
SevenAM follow-up confirmation report uses the new slot snapshot format
HOZO AM follow-up confirmation report uses the new slot snapshot format
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated separately
HTML script blocks parse successfully in both project-local report pages
